---
title: "Literary Review: Business Analytics, Data Science, and Machine Learning Trends"
author: "Team 4"
date: 2026-06-17
format: 
  html:
    bibliography: references.bib
    csl: csl/econometrica.csl
    toc: true
---

Example Inline Citation (Author-Year Format): "The impact of AI on job security has been widely discussed in recent years @smith2023ai."


## References
